name: @codeflow/runtime
description: CodeFlow AI Runtime — Agent Registry + Session Manager + Task Scheduler + Review Engine + Skill Runtime. v0.2.0-beta.3 (MT-5 hotfix): 14 subsystems, 112/112 tests, 0 flakes. MT-5: CursorSdkAdapter.create() no longer passes a `model` field to Agent.create() on any API key tier (BUG-SDK-007 — Cursor backend ACL on ADMIN-class keys disguised as 'Cannot use this model'); the resume-path model wire-through (where BUG-SDK-001 actually fires) is preserved. TS-MODEL-1/2 flipped to assert NO model on create; new TS-MODEL-6 sweeps the (defaultModel × spec.modelId) matrix; TS-MODEL-7/8 regression-guard the resume-path model still works. MT-1/2/4 (BUG-SDK-001/002/004) + atomic-write retry still active. Backed by codeflow-shell. Not published to npm — for ADMIN test only.
